key_facts: The Rheonics SME-TRD is a transmitter designed for inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The SME-TRD has an IP66 rating, indicating protection against dust and strong jets of water.
The device operates on a 24VDC power supply.
Its enclosure is constructed from aluminum with a sprayed polyurethane (PUR) coating, and it uses an FKM o-ring.
The SME-TRD transmitter features three 1/2" NPT ports.
The recommended mounting accessory for the transmitter is the TMB-TRX Transmitter Mounting Bracket.
Rheonics products are protected by US and International patents.
Rheonics offers contact information for Switzerland and USA.
